caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the gold text "BOSS TALK" sits in a studio setting for a podcast recording. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him and a black mug to his right. The background features a white wall with a repeating logo that includes five stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE," alongside a sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the bottom left corner, a small logo reads "BOSS TALK". As the sequence progresses, the man is seen talking and smiling, shifting his posture slightly while remaining seated. His facial expressions change from an open-mouthed speaking pose to a smile as he looks toward someone off-camera to his right.
